name: Dirty Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince onion, bell pepper, celery, and garlic.
2. Grind chicken livers and gizzards.
3. Place fat, gizzards, pork, and bay leaves in a large heavy skillet over high heat; cook until meat is thoroughly browned, about 6 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the minced vegetables, Tabasco sauce, salt, pepper, paprika, mustard, cumin, thyme, and oregano; stir thoroughly, scraping the pan bottom well.
5. Add butter and stir until melted.
6. Reduce heat to medium and cook about 8 minutes, stirring constantly and scraping the pan bottom well.
7. Add pork stock or water and stir until any mixture sticking to the pan bottom comes loose; cook about 8 minutes over high heat, stirring once.
8. Stir in chicken livers and cook for about 2 minutes.
9. Add rice and stir thoroughly; cover the pan and turn heat to very low.
10. Cook for about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and leave covered until rice is tender, about 10 minutes. Remove bay leaves and serve immediately.
